Mini Architecture Report

Summary

Audit complete. 2 Must Fix, 4 Should Fix, 1 Won't Fix across 14 files. L1 universal rules all evaluated; L2 TypeScript rules applied via dependency-cruiser.

Findings

U001: file size exceeds 500 lines (src/core.ts — 612 lines). U004: debug log found outside @app.command decorator (src/util.py:88). Cycle detected: src/a.ts → src/b.ts → src/a.ts.

Rollout

Address must-fix findings before next release. Should-fix items tracked in backlog. Deep pass deferred pending Task-tool runtime availability.
